batch

Class DisplayMetadata2

  • java.lang.Object
    • batch.DisplayMetadata2

  • public final class DisplayMetadata2
extends java.lang.Object
    Utility class to print media metadata in a format emulating ExifTool's -G1 -a -s -u output style.

    This class coordinates file tracking via a MetadataScanner, normalises structural filesystem properties under a standardized [System] group, and dynamically safely casts underlying metadata containers (such as EXIF, TIFF, XMP, and PNG text chunks) into an aligned columnar view.

    Since:
    5 May 2026
    Version:
    1.0
    Author:
    Trevor Maggs

    • Constructor Detail

      • DisplayMetadata2

        public DisplayMetadata2(BatchConfiguration config)
        Constructs a metadata display orchestrator bound to a specific runtime execution context.
        Parameters:
        config - the configuration containing the targeting source parameters and filters

    • Method Detail

      • execute

        public void execute()
        Executes the metadata extraction pipeline across all matching records discovered by the scanner.

        For each verified media file, this method extracts structural file system statistics before evaluating format-specific metadata containers (TIFF, JPEG, PNG, WebP, HEIC). All exceptions occurring during parsing or stream reading are silently intercepted to guarantee that a single corrupted file block cannot crash a multi-file reporting task.

      • displaySystemMetadata

        private void displaySystemMetadata(java.nio.file.Path path)
                            throws java.io.IOException
        Resolves low-level OS platform file traits and prints them matching the standard [System] scope.
        Parameters:
        path - the target path to probe for filesystem records
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if the file system node is inaccessible or unreadable

      • formatTimestamp

        private java.lang.String formatTimestamp(long millis)
        Normalises a Unix epoch timestamp millisecond count into an ExifTool-compliant string representation.
        Parameters:
        millis - the epoch time representation in milliseconds
        Returns:
        a string structured as YYYY:MM:DD HH:MM:SS±HH:MM reflecting local system timezone rules

      • displayTifMetadata

        private void displayTifMetadata(TifMetadataProvider tif)
        Iterates over a TIFF directory structure to translate binary tags and output standard IFD groupings.

        This method handles structure decomposition for raw TIFF headers as well as Exif structures embedded within container blocks (such as JPEG APP1 or HEIC meta boxes). If an explicit XMP structure is detected, it is extracted as an independent segment block.

        Parameters:
        tif - the underlying structural provider containing data blocks and translation tables
